symptom: nginx returns 502 Bad Gateway after deploy
rootCause: Upstream application service stopped and nginx proxy_pass target is down
fix: Restart the upstream app service and verify nginx upstream health before reload
commands:
systemctl status app.service
curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:8080/health
sudo systemctl restart app.service

symptom: Website certificate expired and browsers show NET::ERR_CERT_DATE_INVALID
rootCause: TLS certificate past notAfter date and auto-renewal timer failed
fix: Renew certificate with certbot and reload the web server
commands:
certbot certificates
sudo certbot renew --dry-run
sudo certbot renew && systemctl reload nginx

symptom: PostgreSQL connection refused on port 5432
rootCause: postgresql service not running after host reboot
fix: Start and enable postgresql service
commands:
systemctl status postgresql
sudo systemctl enable --now postgresql

symptom: Disk full errors in application logs and writes failing
rootCause: Root filesystem at 100% capacity due to uncompressed log growth
fix: Rotate and compress old logs, remove stale temp files, extend monitoring
commands:
df -h
du -xh /var/log | sort -hr | head
journalctl --vacuum-time=7d

symptom: Cron job not running at scheduled time
rootCause: systemd timer unit disabled or wrong OnCalendar expression
fix: Enable timer and fix OnCalendar in unit file
commands:
systemctl list-timers --all
systemctl status backup.timer
sudo systemctl enable --now backup.timer

symptom: SSH login fails with Permission denied (publickey)
rootCause: Authorized key missing or wrong permissions on .ssh directory
fix: Restore authorized_keys and set .ssh to 700 and authorized_keys to 600
commands:
ls -la ~/.ssh
chmod 700 ~/.ssh
chmod 600 ~/.ssh/authorized_keys

symptom: Application OOM killed repeatedly in dmesg
rootCause: Process memory limit exceeded under load with no swap configured
fix: Tune service MemoryMax, add swap if appropriate, or scale workload
commands:
dmesg -T | grep -i oom
free -m
systemctl show app.service -p MemoryMax

symptom: DNS resolution failing for internal hostnames
rootCause: systemd-resolved misconfigured or wrong nameserver in /etc/resolv.conf
fix: Fix resolver config and restart systemd-resolved
commands:
resolvectl status
cat /etc/resolv.conf
sudo systemctl restart systemd-resolved

symptom: MySQL too many connections error
rootCause: Connection pool leak or max_connections too low for traffic
fix: Kill idle connections and raise max_connections with monitoring
commands:
mysqladmin processlist
SHOW VARIABLES LIKE 'max_connections';

symptom: Redis out of memory and rejecting writes
rootCause: maxmemory reached with no eviction policy or runaway cache keys
fix: Set maxmemory-policy and flush stale keys or increase memory limit
commands:
redis-cli INFO memory
redis-cli CONFIG GET maxmemory-policy

symptom: Service fails with address already in use on port 8080
rootCause: Stale process holding the port after unclean shutdown
fix: Identify and stop the stale process, then restart the managed service
commands:
ss -ltnp | grep 8080
sudo fuser -k 8080/tcp
sudo systemctl restart app.service

symptom: AppArmor denying access to application data path
rootCause: MAC profile missing rule for new data directory after migration
fix: Add targeted AppArmor local override for the specific path
commands:
aa-status
journalctl | grep -i apparmor
dmesg | grep -i denied

symptom: Inode exhaustion preventing new file creation despite free disk space
rootCause: Small filesystem partition ran out of inodes from many tiny cache files
fix: Clean cache/temp directories and move workload to partition with more inodes
commands:
df -i
du -xh /var/cache | sort -hr | head

symptom: HTTP redirect loop between load balancer and backend
rootCause: Backend force-HTTPS redirect while LB terminates TLS and sends HTTP
fix: Configure X-Forwarded-Proto trust on backend or disable redundant redirect
commands:
curl -I http://127.0.0.1/
curl -I -H 'X-Forwarded-Proto: https' http://127.0.0.1/

symptom: systemd unit in failed state after config edit
rootCause: Syntax error in unit drop-in or missing ExecStart path
fix: Fix unit file syntax, daemon-reload, and restart unit
commands:
systemctl status app.service
systemd-analyze verify app.service
sudo systemctl daemon-reload

symptom: Email delivery failing with relay access denied
rootCause: Postfix not authorized to relay through upstream SMTP provider
fix: Update SASL credentials and permitted relay networks in Postfix config
commands:
postconf -n
tail -n 50 /var/log/mail.log

symptom: Kubernetes node NotReady with disk pressure
rootCause: Kubelet evicting pods because /var/lib/kubelet exceeded eviction threshold
fix: Clean unused images and container logs, increase disk or adjust thresholds
commands:
df -h /var/lib/kubelet
crictl images
journalctl -u kubelet -n 100

symptom: FTP/SFTP uploads fail with permission denied on target directory
rootCause: Upload directory owned by root instead of service account
fix: chown upload directory to service user with least-privilege mode
commands:
ls -ld /srv/uploads
id appuser
sudo chown appuser:appgroup /srv/uploads

symptom: High CPU from runaway log writer filling journal
rootCause: Application debug logging left enabled in production
fix: Reduce log level in app config and vacuum journal
commands:
journalctl -u app.service -n 20
journalctl --disk-usage

symptom: Backup job completes but restore test fails checksum mismatch
rootCause: Backup taken while database was inconsistent without snapshot lock
fix: Use application-consistent backup hooks and verify restore quarterly
commands:
systemctl status backup.service
tar -tzf /var/backups/latest.tar.gz | head
